channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Southend Road Bins Always Overflow!, 6th May
item.description:
Bins near the bus top at 10 Southend Road overflow most days of the week, with litter and poo bags often all over the floor adjacent. I notice this multiple times a week on different days. More/larger bins required and more emptying.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside Rozel Court bin, 6th May
item.description:
Fly tipping overflowing into street by Rozel Court

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant rubbish and flytipping on Colomb Street, 6th May
item.description:
Someone is constantly leaving huge piles of rubbish on Colomb Street - every week they leave piles and piles of household waste. It's been going on for at least a year.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colomb Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed Grass cut, 6th May
item.description:
I live in Bethersden Close Beckenham BR3 1PE and the grass cutters came yesterday and missed the 3 pieces of grass in Bethersden Close BR31PE. They cut 1 piece of grass but not others and the piece they cut with ride on mower yesterday they never strimmed it afterwards. Please can you send grass cutting crew to Bethersden Close BR31PE to cut and strim what they missed. Why do they always miss these pieces of grass. It's 100% council and on your list. We all pay parking permits here because its council highways. Please send team to cut the grass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bethersden Close, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on council premises, 6th May
item.description:
Graffiti on shutters of 141-145 Well Street E9, please arrange removal

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 6th May
item.description:
Dumped rubbish from car plus litter all along pavement gutter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Main Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Vehicles, 6th May
item.description:
Multiple dumped cars and caravans have been dumped in a car park in Burgate Close. All vehicles are untaxed and some without MOT. There are two untaxed vehicles which are still being driven on a daily basis.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burgate Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial Waste, 6th May
item.description:
There is bags left out here on regular basis.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Harper Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags dumped opposite 101 Benares road, 6th May
item.description:
Bags of rubbish dumped by a tree on Benares Road, opposite 101.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benares Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog Fouling, 6th May
item.description:
Continuous dog fouling outside residents property please send crew out to clean up asap as getting worse on a daily basis, stencils have already been put down
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Olyffe Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped trucks contents, 6th May
item.description:
The council finally come to remove the dumped open back truck. However they emptied the contents on the road and pavement before removing the vehicle. Now there's an even bigger mess and it's the council who have fly tipped all this. Come and remove it along with a nearby horsebox also full. Of rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Old Maidstone Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Works signage not removed, 6th May
item.description:
This signage was placed here on the street approx 6-8 weeks ago if not longer, its now been in the bushes for couple of weeks, why didn't the contractor remove after works and more importantly why wasn't this noticed by Southwark?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 6th May
item.description:
Graffiti
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Webber Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New structure built impinges on the pavement. How does this have planning permission ., 6th May
item.description:
As stated blocks part of the pavement making it difficult for wheelchair users and people with buggies
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Stirling Road near Rusper Court, 6th May
item.description:
Mattresses and sofas dumped on Stirling Road next to Rusper Court.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stirling Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in aveley close, 6th May
item.description:
There is a footpath leading from aveley road leading to manor road, there is a mirrored cabinet there in the bushes and this is all cracked and it has sharp bits of glass coming off and someone who has tried to move this has cut themselves. Please can this removed asap and would need to wear gloves.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aveley Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: M&S trolley dumped by Rymans, High Street, Bromley, 6th May
item.description:
M&S trolley dumped by Rymans, High Street, Bromley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 foot wide pothole, 6th May
item.description:
This pothole has been here for months and has been reported previously but has not been repaired, even though previous report shows it as fixed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste on Tabard Street, 6th May
item.description:
There is dog waste on the pavement of Tabard Street. It has been there for two days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 9 Felixstowe Road: chair and boxes., 6th May
item.description:
Fly-tipping is on grass verge opposite 9 Felixstowe Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eynsham Drive, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet
